_comment: Per-project hooks for Rust projects. Copy this file to .claude/settings.json in your repo.

PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then cargo fmt -- $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>&1 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then cargo clippy 2>&1 || true; fi
